title: Maintain cultural sites
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain cultural sites demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess maintenance work required

pcs.text: Identify works required under the management plan and organisational procedures and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify works required under the management plan and organisational procedures and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify works required under the management plan and organisational procedures and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify required machinery and tools to carry out maintenance works and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required machinery and tools to carry out maintenance works and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required machinery and tools to carry out maintenance works and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Estimate materials required for maintenance work and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate materials required for maintenance work and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate materials required for maintenance work and confirm with supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess maintenance work required

elements.title: Prepare for maintenance

pcs.text: Organise machinery, tools and materials to carry out maintenance works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise machinery, tools and materials to carry out maintenance works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise machinery, tools and materials to carry out maintenance works.

pcs.text: Inspect area for hazards associated with maintenance work, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect area for hazards associated with maintenance work, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect area for hazards associated with maintenance work, and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare and assemble safety equipment and materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and assemble safety equipment and materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and assemble safety equipment and materials.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for maintenance

elements.title: Maintain condition of cultural site

pcs.text: Undertake maintenance work according to work programs and work health and safety policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake maintenance work according to work programs and work health and safety policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake maintenance work according to work programs and work health and safety policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Recognise flora and/or fauna that may pose a threat to the cultural site and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise flora and/or fauna that may pose a threat to the cultural site and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise flora and/or fauna that may pose a threat to the cultural site and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Report evidence of deterioration and wear
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report evidence of deterioration and wear?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report evidence of deterioration and wear.

pcs.text: Clean up cultural site on completion of maintenance works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean up cultural site on completion of maintenance works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean up cultural site on completion of maintenance works.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Maintain condition of cultural site

elements.title: Protect cultural site

pcs.text: Report any evidence of damage to cultural site to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report any evidence of damage to cultural site to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report any evidence of damage to cultural site to supervisor.

pcs.text: Report any breach of organisation's procedures to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report any breach of organisation's procedures to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report any breach of organisation's procedures to supervisor.

pcs.text: Maintain protective barriers and signs according to organisational processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain protective barriers and signs according to organisational processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain protective barriers and signs according to organisational processes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Protect cultural site

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
